claim_scope: adjusted SPY underlying event evidence plus conditional Black-Scholes proxy option marks only; BUILD L0; cannot earn L1 or live authority
dominant_failure_mechanism: underlying calendar effect did not survive chronological paired controls
economic_mechanism: beginning-of-month retirement, payroll, and institutional allocation flows produce a short bullish SPY drift

option_stage.capital_basis: structural $1-wide vertical upper bound before net credit; not an observed fill

selection.complement: earliest session among positions 12-17 with the same weekday as the event session
selection.event: first completed trading session of each calendar month
selection.placebo: tenth completed trading session of the same month
